insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work on older versions but should be updated to ensure future compatibility.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their checkout UI extensions and update them to remove the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook. They should also ensure their extensions do not rely on the block_progress capability. This change may require significant updates to extension logic, so it's essential to test thoroughly. The Checkout UI extensions API documentation should be consulted for guidance on replacement functionality.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience issues with checkout UI extensions that have not been updated to remove the deprecated hook. They should encourage their developers to update extensions as soon as possible to avoid any disruptions.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is crucial for maintaining compatibility with future versions of the Checkout UI extensions API. Failing to update extensions may result in broken functionality, negatively impacting the merchant and customer experience.
insight.code_example: query { checkout { id } } mutation { checkoutComplete { userErrors { message } } }

also_worth_knowing.text: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions now use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, starting with API version 2026-07.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now handles breaking changes to Action extensions more gracefully, reducing the likelihood of validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs on every execution, eliminating the need for manual updates.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released, featuring updates to App Update and GCS bundle upload status validation.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify the use of honest and transparent review practices.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout type subtree have been removed in Customer Account API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for more precise region configuration.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting with API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting with version 2026-07.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS Extensions, App Pricing, and Shopify Flow with new features and requirements

themes.title: POS Extensions and UI updates
themes.detail: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, and POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. These updates enable more flexible and powerful POS experiences for merchants.

themes.title: App Pricing and Partnerships
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated with increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events. Additionally, identity verification for Shopify Partners has started to increase trust in the ecosystem.

themes.title: Shopify Flow and App Development
themes.detail: Shopify Flow has introduced changes to Action extensions, resulting in fewer breaking changes, and Action runtime URLs now update automatically. The CLI has also been updated to version 4.4.0 with various fixes and improvements.

actions.text: Update POS UI extensions to use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Review and comply with updated App Store Requirements, including honest and transparent review practices
Migrate from deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field before 2026-10
